title: KenaKata.com – E-Commerce Website
description: Developed a full-featured e-commerce website using Laravel, PHP, MVC architecture, OOP, DbC, SOLID principles, and design patterns, with a focus on an intuitive and professional user interface.

title: DevVerse – Developer Community Platform
description: Built a developer-centric platform for collaboration, code sharing, and community building, empowering developers to share projects, discuss ideas, and enhance their coding skills.

title: JobMate Android App
description: An Android job portal app connecting job seekers with employers, developed using Java, Firebase, Android SDK, and XML.

title: Spell Checker (Word2Vec)
description: Developed an intelligent NLP-based spell checker using Word2Vec embeddings for context-aware spelling correction and word suggestions.

title: E-PATHSHALA – Full-Stack E-Learning Platform
description: Launched an online e-learning platform to make education more accessible, interactive, and engaging. Built with React, Node.js, Express, MongoDB, and TailwindCSS.

title: E-PATHSHALA Mobile App
description: Mobile application version of the E-PATHSHALA platform built with Flutter and Dart, bringing e-learning to mobile devices.

title: Digital Image Processing Research
description: Research and implementation of digital image processing techniques including filtering, edge detection, segmentation, and computer vision algorithms.

title: IoT Smart Drainage System
description: Developed a smart IoT-based drainage monitoring system to prevent urban flooding, integrating sensors, automation, and real-time monitoring.

title: BChat – Integrated Social Media & Cashless Digital Economy Platform
description: Designed and proposed a comprehensive social communication platform integrating messaging, services, and a unified digital payment ecosystem for Bangladesh.

title: Restaurant Management System
description: A comprehensive restaurant management system built with PHP for handling orders, menu management, billing, and customer tracking.

title: Course Management System
description: A console-based C++ project for managing courses and student enrollment with file handling and OOP concepts.

title: Arduino Voice Controlled Robot
description: An Arduino-based voice-controlled and obstacle-avoiding robot combining voice recognition and sensor-based navigation for autonomous movement.
